age_raw: No fixed start age; designed for toddlers learning sink and toilet reach with supervision
rank_rationale: #1 over #2: brand-direct UK page buyable today, full non-slip top for wet feet, and height stays low for this band.
include_rationale: I want to do it myself peaks hard just past two: handwashing and toothbrush jobs they insist on owning. A low, grippy step reaches the basin without a tall learning tower. Steady daily help at the sink when they want to climb up and join in.

age_raw: Children’s stool; no fixed start age on listing
rank_rationale: #2 over #3: 213+ IKEA UK reviews and a five-pound price while staying low for just past two.
include_rationale: Not every first step needs a premium brand once they want to wash hands alone. Wide base and low height still cover sink and toilet jobs. A simple spare for bathroom or kitchen when you want a second step upstairs.

age_raw: Toddler step and potty trainer; supervise climbing
rank_rationale: #3 over #4: different brand from BabyBjörn/IKEA, covering step plus early potty practice in small bathrooms.
include_rationale: Independence jobs stack just past two: step up to wash, then sit to practise. One unit that flips between step and potty saves bathroom clutter in a small flat. Useful when space is tight and both jobs are starting together in the same bathroom.

age_raw: Children’s step stool with handles; no fixed start age on listing
rank_rationale: #4 over #5: handles and height for counter help; second IKEA slot.
include_rationale: Just past two, helping at the sink needs a step they can drag themselves. Stand behind, keep one hand free, then step down together. Useful when BabyBjörn is already in the bathroom and you want a spare for kitchen helping only.

age_raw: Toilet training seat for toddlers moving onto the adult toilet with supervision
rank_rationale: #5: pairs with the BabyBjörn step for adult-toilet practice; second BabyBjörn slot, no third IKEA.
include_rationale: Once the low step is sorted, some children want the adult toilet next. A child seat on the big toilet pairs with the step for the full bathroom job. Second BabyBjörn bathroom piece when the step is already earning its keep beside the basin every day.
